articles.title: Subscription forms customization
articles.desc: We added new options for subscription forms to change the field width, the popup type and the border of the popup.

articles.title: New automation filters
articles.desc: You can now filter users that aren't currently subscribed to any list, and the ones that never subscribed.

articles.title: Manual automation trigger
articles.desc: You can now manually trigger an automation directly from the listing (Enterprise).

articles.title: Subscribers deactivation date
articles.desc: We now save the deactivation date of subscribers, so you can filter them in automations and segments.

articles.title: Performance optimization
articles.desc: We optimized the way AcyMailing works to reduce the number of SQL queries performed on pages.

articles.title: Bounce handling rules
articles.desc: The default bounce rules have been updated to handle even more cases.

articles.title: Sending domains validation
articles.desc: Sending domains are now regularly re-checked with our sending service to make sure authentication remains correct.

articles.title: Lighter campaign editing
articles.desc: The media manager is no longer preloaded when editing a campaign — it now loads only when you open it in the editor.

articles.title: RSEventsPro filtering
articles.desc: New options to filter RSEventsPro events by locations, speakers, tags and sponsors when inserting them in emails.

articles.title: Custom event registration links
articles.desc: Custom event registration links are now taken into account for events inserted in emails.

articles.title: Article insertion fix
articles.desc: We fixed a rare bug that could prevent articles from being inserted into emails.

articles.title: Contact Form 7 compatibility
articles.desc: Our integration with Contact Form 7 is now compatible with their latest version.

articles.title: Contact Form 7 custom fields
articles.desc: You can now add AcyMailing custom fields in Contact Form 7 forms.

splash_content.title: THE FIXES INCLUDED IN THIS VERSION

articles.title: Fixed start date of automatic campaigns
articles.desc: We fixed an issue impacting the starting date of automatic campaigns.

articles.title: A/B testing scheduling
articles.desc: We fixed a bug where a scheduled A/B test campaign was sent to the entire list instead of a percentage.

articles.title: Campaign recipients summary
articles.desc: Disabled subscribers are no longer counted on the summary step of a campaign when showing the number of recipients.

articles.title: Saving without config rights
articles.desc: Saving a campaign or template now works correctly for users without configuration access rights.

articles.title: AcyChecker name validation on subscription forms
articles.desc: We fixed the AcyChecker name check on user subscription that was not working in some cases.

articles.title: CSP compatibility
articles.desc: Some code structure has been improved to avoid CSP blockage when saving a campaign.

articles.title: Security
articles.desc: Global security issues have been fixed.

articles.title: Queued campaigns listing
articles.desc: A deprecation message has been fixed on the queued campaigns listing.
